violations.text: The sink and surface concentration of the sanitizing solution in the 3-bay sink was less than 704 ppm. The concentration of sink and surface sanitizer must be between 704-1875ppm. All dishes to be sanitized in dish machine. Technician to be called to service dispenser. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Utensils are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The sink and surface concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was Correct By: 06/17/2024
